hypothesis: If a cross-modal predictive model that learns to predict each modality from the other two in latent space using graph, text, and XRD representations achieves lower MAE on Matbench and AFLOW crystal-property tasks (Band Gap, Shear Modulus, Bulk Modulus, Dielectric, and Perovskites formation energy) than state-of-the-art single-modality baselines (CGCNN, CoGN, ALIGNN), then integrating multi-modal information improves material property prediction.
